name: enviesados
description: Apply cognitive biases and applied psychology to product/UX design decisions, based on Rian Dutra's 'ENVIESADOS' (2024). Covers 8 biases — Anchoring, Loss Aversion, Cashless Effect, Sunk Cost, Status Quo, Framing, Decision Fatigue, Affect Heuristic — mapped to concrete design decisions (pricing, checkout, trials, cancellation, defaults, copy, choice architecture, visuals), plus a deceptive-design ethics gate.
